key_event.1911-1920: BSA Company rule; two Rhodesias amalgamated in 1911
key_event.1921-1930: 1924 Crown Colony status and Copperbelt mining development
key_event.1931-1940: 1935 Copperbelt strike amid mining expansion and indirect rule
key_event.1941-1950: 1948 African Congress and 1949 Mineworkers' Union formation
key_event.1951-1960: Central African Federation imposed amid nationalist and union mobilization
key_event.1961-1970: Independence (1964), copper wealth, and centralizing state consolidation
key_event.1971-1980: 1972-73 one-party state; copper collapse hollows state capacity
key_event.1981-1990: Economic collapse and rise of ZCTU/MMD opposition
key_event.1991-2000: 1991 multiparty transition, then MMD authoritarian backsliding
key_event.2001-2010: Copper boom and debt relief revive state; civil society checks executive
key_event.2011-2020: PF democratic erosion; media/opposition crackdowns amid 2020 debt default
